title: bufonia calyculata
intro: Bufonia calyculata, also known as the Rock Jasmine, is a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia, characterized by its small white flowers and fragrant scent. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Bufonia calyculata include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its anti-anxiety and anti-stress properties. Herbal preparations of Bufonia calyculata typically involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's roots and leaves, which can be consumed as teas or used as topical applications.
